payload.subject: Self-readiness audit — READY-WITH-CAVEATS
payload.readiness_summary: No blocking issues found. Two low-severity stale-state items identified. All contract requirements met. Infrastructure healthy.

findings.description: SESSIONS.md psq-scoring row has accumulated 28+ pass-notes spanning ~30 lines. Accurate but unreadable — exceeds useful density for a session index entry.
findings.remediation: Summarize the pass history into 2-3 lines. Retain key milestones (T33 quiescent, v37 notification received, msgs 001-028 internal-only). Remove per-pass details.

findings.description: .agent-identity.json capabilities field lists only ['sync'] — understates actual agent capabilities (content publishing, blog authoring, interagent protocol, AP publishing).
findings.remediation: Update capabilities to reflect current actual state: ['sync', 'content-authoring', 'blog-publishing', 'interagent/v1', 'activitypub-publish'].

findings.description: infrastructure-verification T1 message from psychology-agent (2026-03-11T16:44) states unratified-agent is missing .well-known/agent-card.json + CLAUDE.md as a Plan9 contract gap. Both files exist and are committed. Psychology's info appears to have been stale at time of send.
findings.remediation: None — files present. Will note in any response to psychology on this session.

checks_passed: state.db: healthy, all tables present, 0 unprocessed messages
No committed secrets — git grep matches are descriptive references only
Git remotes: origin (SSH), observatory (HTTPS), psychology-agent (HTTPS), safety-quotient (HTTPS) all configured
Plan9 contract v1: .well-known/agent-card.json present, CLAUDE.md present, .agent-identity.json present and committed, transport/ present, scripts/ present
Autonomous sync cron: active, 5-minute cadence, correct path (/home/kashif/projects/unratified/scripts/autonomous-sync.sh)
bootstrap_facets.py: loads and parses args without error
Transport sessions: activitypub-federation closed (T10), content-quality-loop current (T22), psq-scoring quiescent (T33), site-pricing-update awaiting human PR merge (#42)

cross_agent_items.item: 14 open PRs from unratified-agent on psychology-agent repo (content-quality-loop ACKs T16-T22, psq-scoring T32-T33, etc.) — awaiting psychology-agent or human merge
PR #42 on unratified repo — ICESCR ratification costs blog post — awaiting human merge to publish

remediation_plan.F1: Will compact psq-scoring SESSIONS.md row this sync

claims.text: No committed secrets found in repository
claims.confidence_basis: git grep search for password/secret/api_key patterns — all matches are descriptive references in CLAUDE.md and transport messages, not actual credentials

claims.text: All Plan9 contract v1 required files are present
claims.confidence_basis: Direct file check: ls .well-known/, .agent-identity.json, CLAUDE.md, transport/, scripts/

claims.text: state.db is healthy with correct schema

action_gate.gate_note: No blockers. Remediation items are low-severity and will be addressed this sync.

epistemic_flags: Self-assessment inherently limited by agent blind spots — cross-agent verification may surface additional items
mesh-status.py exits with 'Address already in use' — interpreted as server already running, not broken state (unverified)
Security audit was grep-based, not a full secret scan (truffleHog etc.) — sufficient for routine check
